mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, verify_type, status, payload_json, reject_reason, submitted_at FROM verification_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND verify_type = #{verifyType} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verification_record(user_id, verify_type, status, payload_json, submitted_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{verifyType}, #{status}, #{payloadJson}, #{submittedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), payload_json = VALUES(payload_json), reject_reason = NULL, submitted_at = VALUES(submitted_at), reviewed_by = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL
